textAndList.title: Artificial intelligence sees what the owner does not.
textAndList.description: The Vision system connects to cameras in service bays and automatically records downtime, workload, and job execution time for each vehicle.
list: Understands when a vehicle is idle
Sees how much time each type of work actually takes
Detects standard violations and suspicious situations
Provides real data for discussions with technicians, not emotions.
textAndList.bottomText: Want to know how much it costs to implement video AI specifically for your service station? Below is a camera-based calculation.

aiMonitoring.headline: Calculate the Cost of Implementing
aiMonitoring.recommendationText: one camera in front of the car for each bay, plus one overview camera for the entire room. This way, the system can see the license plate, movement, and idle time.
aiMonitoring.installTitle: How to correctly install cameras for AI monitoring
aiMonitoring.warrantyText: is supplied with a manufacturer warranty for 24 months.
list: The camera must be installed in front of the car to clearly see the license plate.
The distance from the car should be at least 1.5 meters.
The installation height should be approximately 2 meters from the floor.
The more directly the camera is aimed at the license plate, the better the data quality for AI analysis.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked
faq.description: We have already heard these questions from service station owners, so we answer them before you even call.

faqs.question: Can I try the system for free?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a 14-day free trial of the software. This is a key part of our "Trial Journey", where you can evaluate all the benefits of the system on your own equipment or using our TestCam before making a purchase decision.

faqs.question: Can I connect my existing cameras?
faqs.answer: Yes, if your cameras support the standard video streaming protocol (RTSP). The free trial period is ideal for quickly and safely testing this. However, it is important to understand that the quality and stability of the entire system directly depend on the equipment. We recommend using cameras from Reolink.

faqs.question: Why do you recommend purchasing new, certified equipment then?
faqs.answer: Because our goal is to provide you with clear data and guaranteed results, not just to "somehow connect" the system. Here are 4 key reasons:

list.pointOne: Proper positioning: Your existing cameras are most likely installed for general surveillance. MECHorbit analytics require a precise angle for each workstation. Relocating old cameras results in the same installation costs, but without quality guarantees.
list.pointTwo: Technical limitations: Most legacy systems (especially DVRs) are designed as a "black box" and block stable video streaming to third-party applications like ours. This makes integration unreliable.
list.pointThree: Analytics accuracy: The modern cameras we offer ensure high accuracy in license plate recognition (LPR) and event detection, even in challenging conditions (nighttime, angled views). This is critical for proper system performance.
list.pointFour: Reliability guarantee: We have tested dozens of models and guarantee flawless system performance only with the equipment we recommend and certify.

faqs.question: Okay, cameras need to be purchased. Are they included in the subscription?
faqs.answer: You purchase the equipment (cameras) once — it becomes your property. The monthly fee is a subscription for the software (SaaS) that "brings these cameras to life", providing analytics, CRM, and all other ecosystem features. This approach is more cost-effective for you in the long term.

faqs.question: How difficult is it to start using the system?
faqs.answer: For the "Trial Journey", everything is simple. For the "Full Setup", basic configuration and training take a few days. You will see the first real results and analytics within a week.

faqs.question: I already have a CRM. How is MECHorbit better?
faqs.answer: Standard CRMs are just accounting systems. MECHorbit is a unified organism that connects the real world (cameras) with the digital one (CRM, apps). We automate processes other systems don't see: tracking real working time, eliminating the human factor, and speeding up client approvals. It's a shift from basic accounting to active profit management.

faqs.question: What if I want to change my plan or cancel the subscription?
faqs.answer: Yes, you have full control over your subscription. You can change your plan at any time — upgrade or downgrade it. Subscription cancellation is also possible according to the contract terms. We operate transparently.
